'''Cyru''' was a security guard at the large bar and casino, the [[LoBue Cantina]] located in the [[Abregado-rae Spaceport]] on the planet [[Abregado-rae/Legends|Abregado-rae]] during the [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn's]] bid for [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] conquest in [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]]. Along with [[Kampl]], another security guard, they maintained the peace in the casino known for it's deceptively small frontage which hid its surprisingly large inside.
